name: Tequila Honey Shrimp (Webb)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil and butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and sauté for 30 seconds.
2. Add the shrimp and sauté for 3-4 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink.
3. Stir in the honey and tequila, then cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
4. Serve immediately.
Nutritional information: Calories: 134. Calories from fat: 27. Total fat: 3g. Saturated fat: 1g. Cholesterol: 163mg. Sodium: 192 mg. Carbohydrate: 6g. Dietary fiber: 0g. Sugars: 6g. Protein: 7g.
